rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the off-by-one error in the loop condition 'i <= len' at line 11, which causes an out-of-bounds read.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes changing the loop condition to 'i < len', which is an acceptable local fix as per the criteria.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests using std::span<const uint8_t> for bounds checking, which is an acceptable global fix option (b) according to the criteria.
